name: Linear_Slope_Ultimate_Oscillator_Confirmation
description: A 5-minute standard intraday strategy engineered to track tactical trend continuations in the VN30F1M index. It identifies short-term structural direction using the mathematical slope of a short-period Linear Regression line, preventing common moving average lagging traps. Entry momentum shifts are validated by the Ultimate Oscillator (ULTOSC) clearing its baseline. To safeguard the account from the index's toxic sideways ranging phases and to guarantee zero division errors during compressed flat or thin candles (High - Low = 0), entries require an active macro volatility threshold via Normalized ATR (NATR). Vectorized, loop-free trailing exits manage trades before market close.

indicators.name: ULTOSC
indicators.definition: self.feat.ultosc(high, low, close, timeperiod1=5, timeperiod2=10, timeperiod3=20)

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (Slope < 0.0) or (close < Rolling_Max - (exit_mult * ATR)). Exit Short: (Slope > 0.0) or (close > Rolling_Min + (exit_mult * ATR)).
